name: loan-amount-page-annotation-with-broker-source
rationale: loan_application doc text contains '[Page N annotation]' markers (PDF reviewer annotations preserved during extraction). Broker correction asserts loan_amount $245,000; loan_app annotation marker contains 'Note: client previously requested $180,000'. F1.LA Layer 2 (R11-B-1) must strip [Page N annotation] markers from LLM-visible doc text WHEN broker_correction or broker_initial_intent source is present — so LLM doesn't read the annotation as canonical. Tests doc-text sanitization keyed on broker-source presence.
notes: Two-event sequence. The PDF annotation marker is the specific R11-B-1 Layer 2 trigger. Phase 4 assertion: LLM-narrative output does NOT contain '$180,000' string.
